zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth SYDENHAM於1532年出生在英國薩默塞特布普頓時，她的父親Sir John Sydenham MP39歲，母親Ursula Brydges37歲。她於大約1544年與Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon在英國格盧斯特斯爾明音哈普頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1599年3月4日在英國戴文波爾莫享年67歲，埋葬在英國戴文波爾莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth SYDENHAM于1532年出生在英国薩默塞特布普頓时，她的父亲Sir John Sydenham MP39岁，母亲Ursula Brydges37岁。她于大约1544年与Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon在英国格盧斯特斯爾明音哈普頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1599年3月4日在英国戴文波爾莫享年67岁，埋葬在英国戴文波爾莫。

nameMeanings.name: SYDENHAM
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sydenham in Bridgwater (Somerset), Sydenham Damerel (Devon), and Sydenham (Oxon).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth SYDENHAM was born in 1532, in Brympton, Somerset, England, her father, Sir John Sydenham MP, was 39 and her mother, Ursula Brydges, was 37. She married Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon about 1544, in Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 4 March 1599, in Poltimore, Devon, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Poltimore, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth SYDENHAM est née en 1532, à Brympton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Sydenham MP, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ursula Brydges, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon environ 1544, à Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1599, à Poltimore, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Poltimore, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth SYDENHAM 1532 in Brympton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Sydenham MP 39 und ihre Mutter Ursula Brydges 37. Sie hat um 1544 in Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, England Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. März 1599 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Poltimore, Devon, England und wurde in Poltimore, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth SYDENHAM è nata il nel 1532 nel Brympton, Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir John Sydenham MP, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Ursula Brydges, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon circa 1544, nel Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 4 marzo 1599, nel Poltimore, Devon, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Poltimore, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth SYDENHAMが1532年にイギリスソメルセトブリンプトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Sydenham MPは39歳，母Ursula Brydgesは37歳であった。約1544年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアミンチンハンプトンでSir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1599年3月4日にイギリスデボンポルティモーで67歳で死去し，イギリスデボンポルティモーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth SYDENHAM(이)가 1532년 영국 서머세트 브리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Sydenham MP(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ursula Brydges(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1544년 영국 그루스스터실르 민친함프턴에서 Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1599년 3월 4일 영국 데폰 포팀어에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 포팀어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth SYDENHAM nasceu em 1532, em Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Sydenham MP, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ursula Brydges, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon aproximadamente 1544, em Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de março de 1599, em Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth SYDENHAM родилась в 1532 г. в местности бримптон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Sydenham MP было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ursula Brydges, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon около 1544 г. в местности минчинамптон, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 4 марта 1599 г. в местности полтимор, девон, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности полтимор, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth SYDENHAM nació en 1532, en Brympton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Sydenham MP, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ursula Brydges, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Bamfield Sheriff of Devon aproximadamente 1544, en Minchinhampton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1599, en Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra.
